scripts.dev: concurrently -n bot,api,web -c cyan,green,yellow "npm run dev -w bot" "npm run dev -w api" "npm run dev -w web"
scripts.start: npm run build -w web && concurrently -n bot,api -c cyan,green "npm run dev -w bot" "npm run dev -w api"
scripts.test: npm run test -w bot && npm run test -w api && npm run test -w web
